name: obsidian-csvzall
description: A fast CSV viewer, editor, and charting tool.

scripts.test:unit: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test .test-build/tests/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter=lcov --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter-destination=coverage/lcov.info .test-build/tests/*.test.js
